message:
feat(macros): enhance proc macro DSL with join_all and improvements

Major enhancements to the asupersync-macros proc-macro crate:

join.rs:
- Improve join! macro implementation for better ergonomics
- Add join_all! macro for dynamic collections of futures
- Better error messages and span handling

race.rs:
- Improve race! macro cancellation semantics
- Better handling of winner/loser outcomes

scope.rs:
- Enhanced scope! macro with improved region handling
- Better integration with cancel protocol

spawn.rs:
- Improved spawn! macro task ownership tracking
- Better compile-time validation

lib.rs:
- Export join_all alongside existing macros
- Update module organization

These macros provide the ergonomic DSL for asupersync's structured
concurrency patterns, making async code safer and more readable.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
